text: How can information regarding a sick person or injured person be disseminated to the CIRM?

options.text: A) By using the appropriate reporting form
B) By contacting the family doctor of the sick person
C) By passing on medical examination report from the company

explanation: CIRM (Centro Internazionale Radio Medico) or similar telemedical assistance services require specific medical reporting forms to provide accurate diagnosis and treatment advice for sick or injured personnel.
